user_query: I'm planning a vacation in Brazil and I want to visit a city that has a lot of public holidays. Can you recommend a city with a high number of holidays for the year 2023?

TaskList.description: Research and compile the list of Brazilian cities and their public holidays for the year 2023.
Analyze the compiled data to identify which city has the highest number of public holidays in 2023.
required_inputs: list of cities and their public holidays

TaskList.description: Recommend the city with the highest number of public holidays as a vacation destination.
required_inputs: city with the highest number of holidays
